name: Sour Cream Breakfast Cake with Pecan and Cinn
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the filling ingredients and set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a large bowl, sift together the flours, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In another bowl, cream the butter, sugar, and sour cream until light and fluffy.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in the cinnamon.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, beating until just smooth.
8. Pour about half the batter into a greased and floured 10-inch bundt or tube pan.
9. Sprinkle the filling evenly down the center of the batter, ensuring it does not touch the sides of the pan.
10. Cover with the remaining batter.
11. Bake until a skewer inserted in the thickest part tests clean, about 45-55 minutes.
12. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a serving plate.
13. Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
